🌶️SheCodes Guide For Spicy Brains🌶️

Have you completed a SheCodes Course?

Do you have trouble remembering someone's name as soon as they've told you?

Like me, you may have a different learning style to other people. I found the school system, here in the UK, of having to retain information in order to get grades a massive failure for people like me. I've created this website as a bit of a 'Pocket Guide' for people who can't just keep information without cross checking the study sources.

4.9/5 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Highly recommended by 262,455 women

This idea is to compliment the courses you've already covered and to give you a user friendly cheat site to work from.
